Home / Services / Bathroom Remodeling

Bathroom Remodeling

Transform your bathroom into a spa-like retreat.

Milestone Construction & Restoration offers comprehensive bathroom remodeling services, creating functional and stylish spaces tailored to your needs. Whether you're looking to update fixtures, reconfigure the layout, or create a luxurious master bath, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.

We specialize in working with the unique challenges of Philadelphia's older homes, including limited space and outdated plumbing. Our team is skilled in tile installation, shower and tub replacements, vanity upgrades, and lighting design. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and beautiful result.

We understand the importance of proper ventilation and waterproofing in bathrooms. We take extra care to prevent moisture damage and ensure long-lasting performance. Our team will work directly with you every step of the way, from initial design to the final touches.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation & Planning
  2. 02 Step 2: Fixture & Material Selection
  3. 03 Step 3: Demolition & Plumbing/Electrical
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation & Finishing

Benefits

  • Increased home value
  • Improved comfort and functionality
  • Modernized aesthetics
  • Water-efficient upgrades

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does a bathroom remodel cost?

The cost of a bathroom remodel varies depending on the size, scope, and materials used. We provide a detailed estimate after the initial consultation.

Can you help with design ideas for my small bathroom?

Absolutely! We have experience maximizing space in small bathrooms and can offer creative design solutions.

What type of ventilation is recommended for a bathroom?

Proper ventilation is crucial to prevent moisture damage. We typically recommend installing a high-quality exhaust fan vented to the outside.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with bathroom remodeling? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +12154065152
